overall.description: A hooded character in ornate robes follows an armored guard through a medieval stone church. The scene transitions from a sunlit courtyard with blue flowers into a dimly lit gothic nave with stained glass windows, proceeding to the altar where a golden sarcophagus lies, then returning toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone courtyard with flower beds approaching church entrance

events.description: character enters the church through the large wooden door
transition from bright outdoor sunlight to dim church interior

agents.ego_description: walking across the cobblestone courtyard toward the church entrance

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the entrance waiting

entered.detail: large stone church building with arched doorway and ivy-covered walls
dense patches of blue flowers lining the courtyard path
irregular stone paving of the courtyard
large wooden church door with stone archway frame

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit stone courtyard lined with blue flowers toward a large stone church. An armored guard stands near the entrance as the character approaches and enters through the arched wooden door, transitioning from bright daylight into the dim interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic church nave with red carpet and stained glass windows

events.description: passing stained glass windows casting colored light onto the floor

agents.ego_description: walking down the long nave following the armored guard toward the distant altar

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking ahead leading the way down the red carpet

entered.detail: long red carpet running the length of the church nave
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall arched windows with colorful stained glass panes
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit church, the character walks down the long nave following the armored guard. The space is defined by tall stone pillars, a red carpet runner, and colorful stained glass windows that cast colored light onto the floor. An iron chandelier hangs from the vaulted ceiling as the character progresses toward the altar.

scene_state.functional_zone: church altar sanctuary with golden cross and sarcophagus

events.description: armored guard steps to the right to allow passage to the altar
character approaches and examines the golden sarcophagus
character turns around to walk back toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the altar, examining the golden sarcophagus, then turning to leave

notable_agents.action: armored guard stepping aside and standing watch near the altar

entered.detail: large golden cross mounted on the wall behind the altar
wooden altar with candles and religious artifacts
ornate golden coffin with intricate carvings containing a body
scattered red and white flower petals covering the carpet

segments.scene_description: Reaching the altar area, the armored guard steps aside to reveal a golden cross and ornate sarcophagus. The character approaches the golden coffin, circles around it to examine the body inside, then turns to begin the journey back down the nave. Flower petals are scattered across the red carpet in the sanctuary area.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning down the nave toward the church exit

events.description: approaching the bright sunlight streaming through the exit doorway

agents.ego_description: walking back down the nave toward the bright exit, passing the armored guard

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the altar watching the character leave

entered.detail: sunlit doorway at the far end of the nave leading outside

segments.scene_description: The character walks back down the nave toward the bright exit, leaving the altar behind. The armored guard remains standing near the altar area as the character passes. The stained glass windows and stone pillars recede into the distance while the bright outdoor light grows stronger, signaling the approach to the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, floral courtyard into the dim depths of a gothic church and back toward the light. It begins in a sunlit stone courtyard lined with blue flowers, moving through an arched wooden door as the character follows an armored guard from the daylight into a shadowed interior. As the camera progresses down the long nave, the environment shifts to a space of tall stone pillars and a red carpet runner, with colorful light from stained glass windows filtering through the dimness. The scene then opens into the sanctuary area where the character circles an ornate golden sarcophagus and a golden cross amidst scattered flower petals before turning away from the altar. Finally, the camera retreats back down the nave, leaving the guard behind as the stone pillars recede and the outdoor light grows stronger toward the exit.
